\tzpentry{ID5630}{Orb Orbital Closure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5630 introduces Orb Orbital Closure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f_{\mathrm{orb}} \sim \frac{v}{2\pi R}. \label{eq:orbital_closure} \end{equation}
